# Solution Gas Oil Ratio

**Summary**: The amount of gas dissolved in one stock tank barrel of oil.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2005-ademola|ADEMOLA, 2005]] evaluated several correlations to predict solution GOR for Nigerian crude oils.

## Scientific Context

- [[2005-ademola|ADEMOLA, 2005]] Determines the amount of gas available for production and its impact on fluid properties.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2005-ademola|ADEMOLA, 2005]] Empirical correlation modeling.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- The Vasquez and Beggs (1980) correlation performed better than Standing and Al-Marhoun for predicting solution GOR. ([[2005-ademola|ADEMOLA, 2005, p. 64]])
